description.ko: FLORA-9은 생물학적 구조와 첨단 컴퓨팅이 결합된 선구적인 하이브리드 생태계를 나타냅니다. 빛과 코드를 통해 숨 쉬고 살아가는 디지털 식물들의 고요한 풍경을 묘사하며, 자연 세계와 인공지능 사이의 경계를 탐구합니다.
description.en: FLORA-9 represents a visionary hybrid ecosystem where biological structures merge with advanced computing. It depicts a serene landscape of digital flora that lives and breathes through light and code, exploring the boundary between the natural world and artificial intelligence.

prompt: A cinematic hyper-realistic shot of FLORA-9, a futuristic digital garden where plants are composed of glowing fiber-optic cables and iridescent data streams. Bioluminescent petals floating in a holographic atmosphere, neon veins pulsing within crystalline leaves, 8k resolution, ethereal lighting, unreal engine 5 style, macro photography of digital ecosystem.
